channel.title: Course Documents on Foldable Robotics
channel.description: Recent content in Course Documents on Foldable Robotics

item.title: Software List
item.description: Type Name / Link Required Cost Python Distribution Anaconda Miniconda Installer Required Open Source Google Colab colab.

item.title: Submission Best Practices
item.description: This page details how to prepare assignments for submission. The “Submission” section of your assignment should provide the details for what format and where to submit assignments.

item.title: Suggested Materials List
item.description: Suggested Materials List Prototyping Item # Link(s) Posterboard1 Cardstock Rubber Bands Stapler / Staples String or Twine Duct Tape Rivets Measurement Item # Link(s) Kitchen Scale Fish Scale Tape Measure SmartPhone Multimeter Electronics Item # Link(s) Microcontroller RC Servo IMU avoid common cardboard(chipboard).

item.title: Syllabus for Foldable Robotics
item.description: Overview Foldable Robotics is a course organized around new types of robots being developed in research labs and industry across the country.
